entry.title: Multi-tenant is it possible to create destinations in the provider account.
entry.content:
I have a multi-tenant application that is using a service destination, currently my application is working when I have the destination in the tenant(consumer) account.

 

I would like to be able to define the destination in the provider account (to avoid create the service destination multiple times for each tenant)

I tried to create the destination in the provider account the same way as I have it in the consumer tenant account but it is not working:

 I get this error:

GET request to /customers/odata/v4/customers/$metadata?sap-language=EN completed with status 500 Error while retrieving destination customer-tent-api-dev from destination service. HTTP status code: 404, token details: {"subdomain":"XXX-t0002","serviceInstanceId":"4680f6bb-099b-4356-9a1e-d1152d9779b1","clientId":"sb-clone4680f6bb099b43569a1ed1152d9779b1!b213793|destination-xsappname!b62","expiration":1727749920,"roleCollections":["Subaccount Administrator"]}

any guidance is appreciated.

Thanks,

Tatiana

entry.title: How change the formate date of EXCEL templete in SAP IBP
entry.content:
Hi friends!

I need to change the format of some templetes in Excel add-in of SAP IBP, before the format was for example: "Jan 01 - 2024 W01" and now is W01 2024 (only show the week and the year), I want to back to the previous format.

I didn't found infomation clear that could help me with this case.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
My name is Marco and for a long time I worked in the technology field in different areas. SAP has always been close to my work and has sparked my curiosity to learn. I believe it's time for a career change, and I am confident I can achieve my goal.

I have a degree in Technology and Systems Development Analysis and a postgraduate degree in project management. I hope to contribute with my knowledge and enhance my experience.

entry.title: Re: SAP LBN Freight Collaboration: TM Integration
entry.content: Is this available for any SAP TM version? I'd like to know if I can follow this steps with SAP TM 9.4

entry.title: Posting stock from f2 to z2
entry.content:
Hello All,

I want to know whether any of you have faced the situation where you have got multiple Storage Locations in S4 Hana which are mapped to one EWM warehouse number resulting in creation of multiple Availability Group as mapping of RP storage location to EWM can't have same Availability Group for two Different Storage Locations.

In such scenario where we Perform SLOC to SLoc transfer via 1 step which result in pointing stock from Stock type F2 to Z* .in such case if storage type have the availability group assigned then it result in error

But if WPT is determining the Availability group that is it possible to perform the posting form F2 to Z* or we need badi implementation?

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: I recently tried VS Code to create tutorial for Devtoberfest and @eshrinivasan helped with this extension to preview the UI before pushing to Q or Prod. I'm glad to know about this which avoids lots of commits...

entry.title: Re: Multi-tenant is it possible to create destinations in...
entry.content:
Have you checked the documentation:

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#use-destinations-from-subscriber-account

?

entry.title: Re: Instructor Led Course limit Number of Days
entry.content: @carolinafaria, there's an open enhancement request to make the number of days greater. Currently, 60 it'd be the limit. Another class would be required to fulfill the 90 days.

entry.title: Becoming a Super Admin: Take Control with SAP Fieldglass Configuration Manager
entry.content:
Are you an SAP Fieldglass Administrator? Now, imagine being a Super Admin! That’s a reality, with the Configuration Manager role! No need to call support for help. As a Configuration Manager, you’re the commander of your own operations. The Self-Service Dashboard is your command center, equipped with all the strategic tools you need. Lost in complex setups? The wizard guides are your mission maps. And the integration section is your intelligence hub, showing statuses and alerts. Nothing escapes your radar!

Like being in charge of a command center, as a Configuration Manager you can supervise every critical function, making sure your operations are smooth and efficient. Check exactly what you can do as this super user and how to perform the available actions here.

entry.title: From Confusion to Clarity: How the SAP Fieldglass PSA Team Can Help You
entry.content:
Does SAP Fieldglass feel like an obscure world where you're searching for better solutions and resources, but still have much to discover? Imagine having an expert guide to lead you through its features, optimizations, and best practices to achieve your business goals. Meet the Product Success Advisory (PSA) Team – a dedicated group of skilled Solution Consultants here to help you drive product adoption and maximize the value of your application. If you need information about features, best practices, and business requirement consultation, the PSA Team is your best choice.

Buckle up!

Discover everything that the PSA Team can help you with and how to engage them here. Let the PSA navigators chart the best course through the complexities of SAP Fieldglass, ensuring you reach your business destinations efficiently!

Disclaimer: the image used is my original compilation based on an image with ‘free to use and modify' license, according to Google search. The image of the Cat Driving a Car meme is used here in accordance with fair use license for the purposes of parody.

entry.title: Query about depreciation calculation in fixed assets
entry.content:
Hola a todos,

En 2020, implementamos SAP y durante la carga inicial de activos fijos, los activos antiguos se ingresaron con fechas incorrectas. Los activos que eran del año 2015 se registraron con fecha de adquisición en 2020. (Imagen 1)

Corregimos la fecha de inicio de la depreciación a la correcta (30 de abril de 2015) y recalculamos los valores. (Imagen 2)

Sin embargo, al revisar los nuevos valores de depreciación, no parecen tener sentido. (Imagen 3)

El tema es que en agosto hay un monto diferente y el resto se prorratea entre los demás meses. Mis preguntas hijo:

  1. ¿Por qué SAP calculó un monto diferente para agosto y luego lo prorrateó entre los meses siguientes?
  2. ¿Cuál es la base de estos cálculos en SAP?

Esperábamos que toda la diferencia de depreciación se registrara en agosto y que a partir de los meses siguientes se reflejara el monto correcto de $ -777,238.

El activo se cargó con los siguientes detalles:

Imagen 4

Imagen 5

El importe que debió depreciarse es el siguiente:

  • Valor de compra: $93,268,568
  • Meses: 120
  • Depreciación mensual: $-777,238

Agradecería mucho cualquier ayuda para comprender y resolver este problema.

Atentamente,

Aurora.

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hi @Amit56 

Please refer to the note for Windows users at the end of step 4 in the instructions. You're likely on a Windows machine, so you need to change import statements to use / instead of \. From your error messages, I believe that's the issue.

entry.title: HOW CAN I GET A HACKER? CONACT /ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST
entry.content: I want to share my incredible experience with ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST  and how they helped me recover my stolen bitcoin, which was a result of a distressing phishing scam. I had received what appeared to be a legitimate email prompting me to provide sensitive information to rectify an issue with one of my online accounts. Unfortunately, I fell victim to this deceptive scheme and unknowingly disclosed crucial login details, which led to unauthorized access to my cryptocurrency wallet. As a result, a significant amount of my bitcoin investment was stolen, leaving me devastated and unsure of how to proceed. It was a disheartening experience that left me feeling helpless and vulnerable to the perpetrators of the scam. After falling victim to the phishing scam, I thought my bitcoin investment was lost for good. However, after reaching out to ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST  and being guided through a thorough assessment, they provided me with a tailored recovery plan and dedicated support. Their professionalism and commitment led to the successful recovery of the majority of my stolen bitcoin. Throughout the process, they maintained clear communication and ensured that I was updated at every step. Their expertise and unwavering dedication were truly commendable. I am tremendously grateful to the entire team at  ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST  for their exceptional service and for going above and beyond to help me reclaim what was rightfully mine. Their ability to navigate the complexities of asset recovery with precision and diligence is truly remarkable. I highly recommend  ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST  to anyone who finds themselves in a similar unfortunate situation. If you need help recovering stolen funds, you can contact  ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST

entry.title: Re: SAP CDS view move from NONDESNOTCONNECTED to a new Ca...
entry.content: is the CDS view made available for extraction. Did you use this @analytics.dataExtraction.enabled: true @analytics.dataCategory: #FACT (or #DIMENSION, depending on your case) @odata.publish: true

entry.title: Rates 2.0: The Greatest Rate Management Show on Earth
entry.content:
Ladies and gentlemen, step right up for the greatest show in SAP Fieldglass rate management: the new magic act of Rates 2.0! Watch as complexities vanish and simplicity appears! The newly developed SAP Fieldglass Rates 2.0 lets you manage your rate structure with a simpler configuration and with all the functional capabilities of the former Rates 1.0. You don’t want to miss this show! Experience it firsthand and be impressed!

ℹ️ Either if you’re new to SAP Fieldglass and will start using Rates 2.0 right away, or if you’re using Rates 1.0 and would like to start the transition to Rates 2.0, this robust document has plenty of useful information for you: Rates 2.0 – Step-by-Step Guide.

entry.title: Re: Create SAPUI5 Applications with Google Firebase
entry.content:
Hi vvdries!!!
Nice solution you have here!! I've been playing a lot with it, lately. And I was wondering if you have a way to use the functions provided by Firestore, such as getDocs, etc.

In essence the problem that I have is that I have a collection already created in Firestore, which in turn have a reference field pointing to documents in other collections.  Based on Firebase documentation, I need to use either getDoc() or getDocs() (in case you want to get them in bulk).  But despite all my efforts, I am unable to use such functions (I do have already installed Firebase npm package, but can't reference it from within the controller of my view)

Again, nice job and thanks in advance.

Regards

Maro

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Performance Analysis Tool
entry.content:
Hi @thomas_fery what is "internal processing" comprised of? (if not frontend, backend or network)
We have a very simply story that usually runs within 3 seconds but for one instance suddenly jumped to 200 seconds "internal processsing" time.

entry.title: Re: SAP Reserved Characters for Business Place ODN Prefix...
entry.content:
Hi,

I strongly suggest opening a Support incident, as this behavior seems incorrect as the system is giving you no choice to maintain valid entries as a user.

Regards,

-Carlos

entry.title: Be Part of the Change: Join the SAP Fieldglass User Experience Council
entry.content:
You don’t have to be part of the SAP Fieldglass Development Team to help with its design and innovations. Join the SAP Fieldglass User Experience Council (UXC) and become a co-innovator in shaping the platform’s future! This collaborative group of nominated users provides valuable feedback on the usability and design of the SAP Fieldglass application. Your voice matters!

Interested in becoming a UXC member?

For more details about the SAP Fieldglass UXC and how you can get involved, see the Introduction to the SAP Fieldglass User Experience Council (UXC). Join us and make a difference in the SAP Fieldglass experience!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David,

I hope this finds you well. My name is Enrico, and I’ve been working in academy as data analyst in particle physics and neuroscience for so many years now. I’m reaching out regarding the certification opportunity, as I'm looking to switch my careers mid-life, from academy to the private sector. This certification would be a significant step forward to achieve this professional change, allowing me to gain the needed expertise. I am very excited about its potential and I gratefully appreciate the chance to apply for a free certification.

Thank you in advance for considering my application.
Regards,
Enrico

entry.title: Re: BiWhy – BusinessObjects Support Tool
entry.content: Up to date features: https://www.biwhy.net/features

entry.title: SOW Characteristics: The Blueprint for Seamless Project Management
entry.content:
In the world of procurement and project management, the Statement of Work (SOW) is your project’s playbook. It’s packed with key activities, called Characteristics, that keep track of payments and events, breaking down costs, timelines, and milestones.

Perfect Planning, Perfect Execution!

Customizing these elements to suit your project’s needs ensures everyone is on the same page and promotes a successful collaboration between the buyer and the supplier. It’s like putting a jigsaw puzzle together – when every piece is in its place, the complete picture becomes clear!

ℹ️ For more information about SOW Characteristics and the steps about how to add them to your SOW, see Statement of Work (SOW) Characteristics.

entry.title: HIRE A HACKER TO RECOVER MONEY LOST TO ONLINE SCAMMED HIRE ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST
entry.content: Be on alert while trading on Bitcoin. I had a very unpleasant experience, losing $137,500 of my investment while trading. I lost my mind and didn't know where to start with recovering my funds or if it was even possible to recover it at all. I contacted my close friend who had introduced me to trading and explained to her that I had lost everything I traded, amounting to $137,500. Immediately, she asked me to contact ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST. After I made contact with haste, they started the recovery process, assuring me that I would get back everything I lost. I was so happy because, within no time, they helped me recover all my $137,500 back. To any investor who might have lost funds while trading, quickly contact ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST and start the journey to recovering all your lost funds within no time. They also gave me tips on how to avoid losing funds while trading on Bitcoin and how to keep my account safe from hackers. My encounter with ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST has been transformative, restoring both my lost funds and my faith in cryptocurrency trading. After my significant financial loss, I felt overwhelmed and hopeless. The sheer amount of money lost—$137,500—left me in a state of shock and disbelief. My initial reaction was to panic, and I had no idea where to begin in terms of recovery..my close friend who introduced me to trading was quick to respond with a solution. She recommended ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST, and I reached out to them immediately. From the very first interaction, the team at ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST displayed professionalism and empathy, which was crucial in calming my nerves. They assured me that recovering my lost funds was possible and that they would handle the process efficiently. Their approach was methodical and thorough.  After gathering all necessary details about my situation, they launched into action. Their expertise in blockchain technology and cryptocurrency recovery was evident from the start. They meticulously analyzed the transactions and identified the breaches that had led to my loss. Throughout this process, their communication was exemplary. They kept me informed at every step, explaining what they were doing and why, which significantly boosted my confidence in their abilities. The speed at which ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST operated was particularly impressive. Within a remarkably short period, they managed to recover the entire $137,500. This quick turnaround was not just a relief but a testament to their proficiency and dedication. The sense of despair that had engulfed me was swiftly replaced by immense gratitude and relief. Beyond recovering my lost funds, they provided invaluable advice on how to safeguard my investments moving forward. They educated me on best practices for trading safely and how to protect my accounts from potential hackers. This guidance has been instrumental in restoring my confidence in trading and ensuring that I am better prepared for the future. Their emphasis on regulatory compliance and ethical standards further solidifies their reliability. They operate within stringent industry guidelines, ensuring transparency and legality in all their dealings. This not only enhances their credibility but also provides clients with a sense of security and trust..my experience with ADWARE RECOVERY SPECIALIST has been nothing short of extraordinary.

entry.title: Adding association as input parameter for custom action in CAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm using CAP(Node.js) with odata(v4) & fiori elements. I am creating a custom add button so that user can add multiple values from valuehelp to draft rather than using the create button which allows you to create only one entry at a time.  As we know that you can't use associations as an input parameter of custom actions, So I have been using a workaround for it. Create a type in cds service file with a field that has type array of string i.e type customType{someField : array of String}, Use this field as an input parameter i.e. action someAction( someField: customType : someField), And then assigning a valueHelp to this field through annotations. 

This works fine if the associated entity has only one key. But if the associated entity has two key fields  i.e. composite key, there doesn't seem to be a way to store both the keys from the valueHelp. Any ideas on how to achive this ?

I used the following blog to implement this work around (6. Action with Value Help Input) : 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/cap-with-fiori-elements-actions-on-list-report-object-page-using/ba-p/13572833

entry.title: 500 connection Timed Out while updating Scheduling settings SAP TM
entry.content:
Good Afternoon community,

I have an issue, when im trying to upload the scheduling settings in SAP TM, by an excel file, the system shut down after 10-15 minutes. This is the error that i get:

I've alredy check the ST22, and i dont have information. 

Please, if someone have seen this message, i would appreciate the help.

entry.title: BiWhy - OS Monitoring History
entry.content:
Now you can pull OS Metrics history with BiWhy from your hosts with the SAP Host Agent installed and zoom in on problematic areas.

 

By default, the SAP Host Agent keeps history for 31 days.

 

OS Metrics include about 50 metrics for CPU, memory, network, disk, files, and VM.

https://www.biwhy.net/post/os-monitoring-history

entry.title: Re: SAP CDS view move from NONDESNOTCONNECTED to a new Ca...
entry.content: Hi Savio, I extract the data into BW. I used all required annotations to extract the data into BW and I'm already using it. However, my issues is how to move to a proper application component in BW. When I create the datasource, I see the application component field is greyed. Basically, I can't assign the application component. There is no annotation available to support this either. I read one of the blog. The authori of the blog clearly shows how he assigns the application component. However, in my case, the application component field is uneditable. Not sure whether this is an eclipse issue, BW modelling issue or anything else. We are using 2023 Eclipse with the available BW modelling addons. Thank you very much for your support

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content:
Right out of college, I just received a positve feedback on my CV and the job was mine.

It was SAP consultant. Never heard of SAP before. Now 17 years later, it all makes sense

entry.title: Re: Recipient Determination in Workflow Rules in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content:
Hello Lars,

It worked, however instead of star I simply removed all filters.

regards

Rafał

entry.title: How to update some fields in the tile "Manage Ocean freight Bookings"?
entry.content:
We are currently working on updating the following date fields in the Manage Ocean Freight booking tile using the Freight Booking API:

  • Estimated Departure Date
  • Actual Departure Date
  • Estimated Unloading Date
  • Actual Unloading Date
  • Estimated Arrival Date
  • Actual Arrival Date

We noticed that these fields are available in the service Freight Booking Event int the API freight booking (A2X) but we can retrieve this data via a GET request, we are unable to perform any UPDATE operations on these fields. Could you please advise us on how we can update these specific date fields through the API? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to update some fields in the tile "Manage Ocean f...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

The values of these fields on the "Manage Ocean Freight Booking" App are as you have also mentioned, correctly stored/derived from the corresponding Event Entity of the Freight Booking API. To report additional Events like Arrival/Departure or ETA/ETD for a specific stop, the API action below can be used:

Report Freight Booking Event

My assumption would be that if there are new Events reported, the fields will also be updated on the "Manage Ocean Freight Booking" App depending on the content of the reported events.

I hope this already helps you!

Best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: EWM Bulk Storage Type Setup, Putaway and Picking strategy
entry.content:
Hi Anil,

I setup the same to receive same material with diff batches in same bin but its taking another bin after 2nd HU. as per the setup 1 bin can receive 8 HU's but its suggesting the new bin after the 2nd HU. 

Could you please help me to get the reason?

entry.title: Talk to Your Data: A Gen AI use case with SAP HANA Cloud vector engine and SAP generative AI hub
entry.content:
Introduction:

In continuing the exploration of innovative SAP HANA Cloud vector engine implementations, we now turn to another remarkable example from LeverX. LeverX from SAP Partner Ecosystem has developed an innovative solution as part of the SAP BTP Gen AI Lighthouse Program. Continuing from Wipro and Deloitte's success stories, this blog explores how LeverX leverages the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine to transform operations and boost efficiency across industries. LeverX has implemented the Unstructured Data Intelligent Assistant solution, addressing challenges in searching and analyzing unstructured data stored in custom formats, helping companies streamline and optimize production design processes.

Use Case: Unstructured Data Intelligent Assistant

Problem Statement:

Most companies face challenges in effectively searching, navigating, and analyzing unstructured or custom data stored in various formats such as CAD and PDX. They struggle with the lack of embedded tools for searching through local custom repositories and cloud data storage containing unstructured or packed data. Additionally, data management issues, such as the creation of duplicated data instead of reusing existing templates, further complicate the process. Complex tools make it harder for users to use natural language prompts for efficient data search and analysis across both SAP and non-SAP platforms.

Solution:

LeverX designed an Unstructured Data Intelligent Assistant solution on the SAP BTP platform that, according to the company, seamlessly integrates ERP data sources, utilizing efficient data preparation methods and harnessing the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine for advanced storage and vector-based search capabilities. It leverages SAP BTP's request processing layer, utilizing the SAP Generative AI Hub to transform natural language prompts into SQL queries and performs vector search against vectorized information in HANA Cloud, enabling efficient and accurate data retrieval. The processed data is then visualized and made accessible through a flexible Intelligent Assistant component.

The Intelligent Assistant operates in two modes: Standalone Mode and Embedded Mode. In Standalone Mode, it functions independently, providing powerful search and analysis capabilities through APIs, allowing users to interact with unstructured data across various platforms. In Embedded Mode, it integrates seamlessly within SAP systems, enhancing the ability to search and analyze unstructured data directly within the SAP environment.

This dual-mode functionality ensures that the Intelligent Assistant can be integrated across different workflows and systems, whether on SAP or non-SAP platforms. By supporting both standalone and embedded deployment, this solution addresses the lack of ready-to-go tools in the market, significantly reducing the effort required to search through files in proprietary formats.

LeverX created the solution to help non-technical users analyze proprietary data more effectively, support better data management practices, and reduce duplication through the reuse of existing templates to enhance operational efficiency and decision-making processes.

Solution Overview:

Reference Architecture:

 

Value Add of SAP HANA Cloud vector engine:

The SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine plays a crucial role in the Intelligent Assistant solution by enhancing the capabilities of searching and analyzing unstructured data. Here’s how it is used in this context:

  • Vector-Based Search Capabilities: The SAP HANA Cloud vector engine powers similarity searches by interpreting the semantic meaning of queries, making it more effective in retrieving relevant information from unstructured data like PDFs, CAD files, and PDX files, compared to traditional keyword searches.
  • Handling Unstructured Data: Unstructured data often lacks a predefined schema, making it challenging to search and analyze using conventional methods. The vector engine addresses this challenge by supporting the storage and querying of vectors (obtained from embedding the unstructured data) that capture the context and relationships, enabling accurate and efficient searches even with large and varied datasets.
  • Enhanced Data Retrieval: The vector similarity search capability allows the Intelligent Assistant to find data based on conceptual similarity rather than exact matches, making searches with natural language prompts more intuitive and user-friendly.
  • Integration with Natural Language Processing: The vector engine works in conjunction with the SAP generative AI hub, which processes natural language queries into SQL and performs vector search against vectorized information in HANA Cloud. The vector engine performs the search and retrieval process, allowing users to ask complex questions in plain language. It provides precise answers, even when the underlying data is unstructured and distributed across different repositories.
  • Integration Across SAP and Non-SAP Systems: The vector engine's integration with SAP BTP allows for seamless access and retrieval of data across both SAP and non-SAP systems, ensuring comprehensive search capabilities across all relevant data sources.

Conclusion:

Our partners, such as Wipro, Deloitte, and LeverX, are leveraging the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine and SAP BTP services to create innovative solutions that drive real value for our joint customers across various industries. These collaborations showcase how the power of SAP technologies is transforming business operations and enabling new levels of efficiency and insight. From enhancing AI-driven solutions to improving data management and analytics, each partner's use case has showcased the transformative potential of using SAP HANA Cloud to power intelligent data applications. With the insights shared in this series, I hope to have provided a comprehensive understanding of how SAP HANA Cloud can be leveraged to solve real-world challenges. Keep an eye out for future events as we keep exploring the exciting and ever-changing world of technology powered by the in-memory database.

Note: This blog is a collaborative effort between SAP HANA Cloud Product Management and LeverX, highlighting the innovative solution developed by the LeverX team: Vitali Usau (vitali.usau@leverx.com), Dzmtry Buriak (dzmitry.buriak@leverx.com), Pavel Lazhbanau (pavel.lazhbanau@leverx.com), Siarhei Valenda (siarhei.valenda@leverx.com). For those interested in learning more or exploring implementation details, please feel free to reach out to the mentioned team member contacts.

References:

  1. Try for yourself:
    • Explore SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine via Basic Trial
    • Harnessing Generative AI Capabilities with SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
    • Develop a CAP-based (multitenant) application using GenAI and Retrieval Augmented Generation
  2. Read about other partner use cases leveraging SAP BTP's Generative AI capabilities
    • SAP Lighthouse Program - Partner Use Cases adopting BTP GenAI Capabilities [Part 1]
    • SAP Lighthouse Program - Partner Use Cases adopting BTP GenAI Capabilities [Part 2]
    • SAP Lighthouse Program - Partner Use Cases adopting BTP GenAI Capabilities [Part 3]

entry.title: Can you delete a G/L account in Quality System S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hello,

We created a G/l Account in our quality (test) system but realize we don't need it anymore. How can we delete it completely before transporting the other system changes? S/4HANA Cloud.

entry.title: Supplier invoice Posting Date and Invoice Date
entry.content:
Hi,

We would like to know why there is a difference between the ‘Invoice Date’ and the ‘Posting Date’ of a Supplier Invoice.

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Supplier invoice Posting Date and Invoice Date
entry.content: See KBA 3523722 - ‘Invoice Date’ and the ‘Posting Date’ of a Supplier Invoice

entry.title: Getting error with API of Production Order Confirmation
entry.content:
Hi,

During a Production Order confirmation via API_PROD_ORDER_CONFIRMATION_2_SRV, the following error message appears:
"You do not have start authorization for R3TR IWSV API_PROD_ORDER_CONFIRMATION_2_SRV 0001, return code 4"

What is the reason?

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Getting error with API of Production Order Confirmation
entry.content: See KBA 3523768 - Error with API_PROD_ORDER_CONFIRMATION_2_SRV

entry.title: Running SAP Build Automation BOT in Unattended Mode
entry.content:
Hi SAP Build Automation Experts,

We have developed a BOT that performs a SAPUI5 process (click on web components and so on) This process was recorded using the "Screen recorder". currently running on a VDI provided by our customer. However, we are encountering issues when attempting to run the BOT in unattended mode. The BOT fails to run when no one is logged into the VDI, but it runs smoothly when any developer is logged in.

According to the documentation, there are two main options for running UI BOTs: Unattended Mode and Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP). Unfortunately, it's unclear to us when each option should be used and what the key differences are.

Could someone advise us on the appropriate use cases for each option and why one might be preferred over the other?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: HIRE A QUALIFIED BTC/USDT/ETH RECOVERY SERVICE- VISIT SALVAGE ASSET RECOVERY
entry.content: My name is Avery, and I am a historical interpreter based in New Hampshire. Throughout my career, I have had the privilege of immersing myself in various periods of history, bringing past events to life for those eager to learn. However, a recent experience has shifted my focus from historical narratives to a very personal and pressing matter: the recovery of funds lost to a forex scam.Like many others, I was drawn to the promise of substantial returns offered by forex trading. I invested a significant amount of money, believing in the legitimacy of the opportunity and the brokers involved. To my dismay, I soon discovered that I had been deceived by a sophisticated forex scam. The realization that $150,000 had vanished into thin air was both shocking and distressing.In the face of this financial and emotional turmoil, I knew I needed professional help to recover my lost funds. My search for a reliable recovery service led me to Salvage Asset Recovery, a company renowned for its expertise in financial recovery. From the moment I contacted them, I was impressed by their professionalism and thorough approach. Salvage Asset Recovery specializes in reclaiming lost funds from various types of financial fraud, including forex scams. Their team of experts is well-versed in the intricacies of these scams and employs a strategic approach to recover stolen assets. They provided me with a clear outline of the recovery process, setting realistic expectations and ensuring that I was informed at every step.The recovery process with Salvage Asset Recovery was both efficient and reassuring. Their team conducted a comprehensive investigation into the scam, tracing the funds and identifying the perpetrators. They utilized advanced tools and legal expertise to pursue recovery options, leaving no stone unturned. Throughout the process, their communication was excellent, and they provided regular updates on the progress of the case.Thanks to Salvage Asset Recovery’s diligent efforts, I was able to recover the full amount of $150,000. Their dedication and expertise were instrumental in resolving a situation that had initially seemed hopeless. I am deeply grateful for their support and am relieved to have regained my financial stability.If you find yourself in a similar situation, facing the daunting challenge of recovering funds lost to a forex scam or any other type of financial fraud, I highly recommend reaching out to Salvage Asset Recovery. Their team of professionals is equipped to handle complex recovery cases and can provide the assistance needed to navigate this difficult process.while my work as a historical interpreter allows me to explore and explain the past, my recent experience has underscored the importance of seeking expert help in times of crisis. Salvage Asset Recovery’s successful recovery of my funds serves as a testament to their skill and commitment. Don’t hesitate to contact them if you need help recovering lost assets—they are experts in this field and can make a real difference. Consult Salvage Asset Recovery via below contact details.

entry.title: Accessibility in SAPUI5
entry.content:
Hello, and Welcome! Embracing Accessibility for All.

Introduction

  • In our fast-paced digital age, ensuring that everyone can engage with the world around them is more important than ever. Here Accessibility plays a major role in the Quality or Characteristic of the Application that makes it possible to approach, enter, or use it. It refers to the possibility for everyone, including differently-abled people, to access and use information technology products.
  • Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) explains how to make web content more accessible for everyone.

Why Accessibility Matters

  • Comprehensive for All

  • Wider Audience Reach

  • Commitment to Equality

  • Enhanced Usability and UX

Accessibility in SAP Fiori 

  • Accessibility features are essential for users with disabilities. In an ongoing approach, SAPUI5 controls aim to comply with various product standards such as screen reader support, high-contrast theming, and keyboard handling.

  • Features designed for accessibility, like clear navigation and captions, improve the overall experience for everyone, not just those with specific needs.
  • In SAPUI5 Accessibility is incorporated at two levels :
    • Framework Level
      Screen Reader Support for SAPUI5 Control
      Keyboard Handling for SAPUI5 UI Elements
      Visualization
        - Minimum Contrast
        - Consistency of Icons
        - Focus Visualization Design
        - Layout Adaptation for Different Devices
        - Support for Text Resizing up to 200%
      High Contrast Themes for SAPUI5 Controls
      Messaging Patterns
    • Application Level
      Many requirements are already covered at the framework level, but design approaches that are related to the ease of use of applications at the end-user level are more important and it depends upon design teams.
        - Understanding
        - Initial focus position
        - Structure and fast navigation
        - Keyboard shortcuts
  • Any changes in the framework definitions can impair accessibility. ex. Custom controls or Custom theming.
  • You can read the full information in Accessibility Documentation at SAP SDK.

Steps to Improve Accessibility

  • Accessibility Audits: This can help to check areas of improvement in the product.

  • Consider Color Contrast: Ensure there is adequate contrast between text and background colors to improve readability.
  • Keyboard Navigation: Creating keyboard-friendly interfaces involves designing with the user experience in mind, allowing seamless interaction through the keyboard alone.
  • Use Alt Text, Tooltips for Images, Buttons, etc: Help screen reader users by providing detailed information about the accessed area.
  • Example :

Conclusion

  • Accessibility is not just a checkbox to tick; it’s a promise to cultivate a world where everyone can Advance.
    Thank you for taking a moment to consider the importance of accessibility.
    As we progress, let’s prioritize accessibility in our design and decision-making processes. Ultimately, a more accessible world is advantageous for all.

I hope you found this helpful! Feel free to share any comments or suggestions for improvement.

Thank you 😊

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – How to fix Changed and Outdated Catalogs
entry.content:
Hi Team,

entry.title: Re: Issue when publishing content from WPB/SEN
entry.content:
Hi Stephen,

If the URLs have an extra / in them, this will definitely be an issue.  Sorry, I don't know what is wrong with your configuration but something is so I would raise an SAP support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-MGR and get support with the issue.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Will 'Refund Control' = 'Create Credit Memo Request'...
entry.content:
Hi Tu,

You can decide which conditions trigger the approval workflow and implement them in the corresponding BAdI. 

Please check the below link where the configuration and extensibility requirements for workflow are explained.

In the screenshot below, it is highlighted in red the section where the details about the BAdI that needs to be implemented are explained.

Regards,

-Carlos

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/709aae2194ab45cd9867515282da7351.html?q=customer+return+workflow

entry.title: Re: Issues creating Hana DB Free tier instance on Azure
entry.content: Still stuck. I have in the mean time been able to create an instance on azure east, AWS east, AWS Tokyo and AWS Montreal with no such issue. Just Azure West is not able to create. Not sure what to do, maybe it just doesnt work on Azure west, too bad, that.

entry.title: Load 0WBS into internal table in start routine to lookup in transformation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm struggling a bit with abap as I'm not an abaper, just trying to do something simple.

As the title states, I want to load 0WBS_ELEMT_ATTR (Fields: 0CO_OBJNR and 0WBS_ELEMT) into an internal table in start routine and use that to lookup.

In the start routine I've declared the table.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_wbs,
         co_objnr   TYPE /BI0/OICO_OBJNR,
         wbs_elemt  TYPE /BI0/OIWBS_ELEMT,
END OF ty_wbs.

Trying to load the table is where I'm running into trouble

SELECT co_objnr
       wbs_elemt
INTO TABLE it_wbs
FROM /BI0/PWBS_ELEMT
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN SOURCE_PACKAGE

This needs a where clause and I'm not sure how to write it.

the 0CO_OBJNR in 0WBS_ELEMT_ATTR is type CHAR and Length 22.

the routine I'm writing it in where I want to match PS_PSP_PNR is type NUMC and Length 08.

How can I write something like this without it erroring saying co_objnr and ps_psp_pnr are different type and length.

WHERE co_objnr = SOURCE_PACKAGE-PS_PSP_PNR

Thanks

entry.title: Re: HIRE A QUALIFIED BTC/USDT/ETH RECOVERY SERVICE- VISIT SALVAGE ASSET RECOVERY
entry.content:
CONTACT JUDAS FOR YOUR CRYPTO CURRENCY/ BTC RECOVERY AND MANY MORE


I was at the verge of giving up on all hopes of finding any real solution or at least answers to my crypto issues when I first came across and read an article about HACKER JUDAS. It was truly becoming exhaustively frustrating when I started having troubles accessing my bitcoin wallet for weeks; but kept receiving email notifications of transactions I know nothing about; and then even got worse and tension rising after I discovered I wasn't getting much help other than formalities from the wallet company, even after their estimated wait period elapsed. Sceptical, but having not more to lose, I contacted HACKER JUDAS and explained all of my problems to them in details, also providing related messages as proofs and verifications. Though hoping for solution, I was truthfully bracing up for another round of disappointments as I couldn't help comprehend in totality, the complexity of the processes explained by their agent RON who was very professional and patient to explain repeatedly. Very happily and satisfactorily, HACKER JUDAS didn't only help me gain access back to my wallet, also they were able to recover my balance back to the last cent. You can contact for any consultation/services:

E MA IL : hack er judas 9@gma il . Co m
CONTACT: +1{807} 500 2291

entry.title: Re: BODS Meta Data Table for Substitution Parameters/Conf...
entry.content:
Check for other metadata tables that may store file formats and substitution parameters. Some common tables to look at include

AL_FILEFORMATS
AL_SUBSTITUTIONS

entry.title: REACH OUT TO DIGITAL TECH GUARD RECOVERY TO TRACK AND RECOVER YOUR STOLEN CRYPTO ASSETS WITH EASE.
entry.content:
The Role of Digital Tech Guard Recovery Technology in Uncovering Marital Deceit In today's digital age, the ability to uncover hidden truths within relationships has been greatly enhanced by the advent of Digital Tech Guard Recovery technology. This powerful tool allows investigators and concerned parties to delve deep into the online history and activities of individuals, revealing a wealth of information that may have previously remained obscured. When it comes to the complex and often murky world of marital deceit, Digital Tech Guard Recovery can be an invaluable resource. By extracting data from devices, accounts, and online interactions, this technology can uncover a startling trail of breadcrumbs - deleted messages, hidden email exchanges, and covert social media activity - that can expose the reality behind a facade of marital bliss. Far more than just a means of collecting evidence, Digital Tech Guard Recovery empowers those seeking the truth to navigate the labyrinth of digital deception, lending clarity and insight where it was once shrouded in mystery. In the hands of skilled professionals, this cutting-edge technology becomes a scalpel with which to meticulously dissect the digital footprint of suspected infidelity or betrayal, providing the comprehensive understanding necessary to confront the issues at the heart of a troubled marriage. As our lives become increasingly entwined with the digital world, the role of Digital Tech Guard Recovery in lifting the veil on marital deceit only continues to grow in importance, offering a powerful antidote to the smoke and mirrors that can so often cloud the reality of human relationships. I will urge you to call Digital Tech Guard Recovery now through:

Greetings.

entry.title: Re: Publish back compensation information to EC
entry.content: Yes xml only. You can contact support though and request they make the xml change for you if you know the specific component. Please ensure you provide enough lead time for this to be completed.

entry.title: Is there a way to add new Additional Product Data tags in the add/edit product page?
entry.content:
Hello, everyone!

I'd like to add additional fields to the "Additional Product Data" section in the add/edit product page.  We're currently using attributes to hold additional product data and it's very messy.  I don't see a responsive template we can edit for that information or anywhere in the Product setup that will allow us to add an additional field.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: HIGHLY RECOMMENDED LOST CRYPTOCURRENCY RECOVERY SERVICE/ DIGITAL TECH GUARD RECOEVRY
entry.content: In the fast-paced world of forex trading, opportunities and risks go hand in hand. My experience with forex trading, unfortunately, turned into a nightmare that cost me a staggering $255,500. It all started when I came across what seemed like an enticing investment opportunity with a forex trading platform. The initial promises were impressive: high returns, sophisticated trading tools, and a supportive customer service team. However, as time went on, it became apparent that this was not the legitimate trading platform it claimed to be but a sophisticated scam designed to exploit unsuspecting investors like myself. The trouble began when I tried to withdraw my funds. At first, there were minor delays, which I initially dismissed as part of the normal withdrawal process. However, as weeks turned into months, these delays turned into an endless cycle of excuses and broken promises. My attempts to contact the platform’s support team were met with vague responses and unfulfilled assurances. It became increasingly clear that my funds were trapped in a system that was designed to evade any genuine attempts at recovery. Feeling desperate and with little hope left, I began to search for solutions. That's when I discovered Digital Tech Guard Recovery. Their reputation for assisting victims of financial scams and their track record of successful recoveries gave me a glimmer of hope. I reached out to them, and from the moment I made contact, their professionalism and dedication were evident. The team at Digital Tech Guard Recovery understood the complexity of the situation and immediately started working on my case. The recovery process was thorough and efficient. Digital Tech Guard Recovery conducted a comprehensive investigation, identifying key aspects of the scam that were crucial for recovering the funds. They kept me informed every step of the way, which alleviated much of the stress and uncertainty I had been feeling. Their expertise in dealing with such cases was apparent as they navigated through legal and technical challenges to retrieve my money. Within a surprisingly short period, Digital Tech Guard Recovery managed to recover the full amount of $255,500. This was a tremendous relief and a testament to their skill and dedication.

entry.content: In the fast-paced world of forex trading, opportunities and risks go hand in hand. My experience with forex trading, unfortunately, turned into a nightmare that cost me a staggering $255,500. It all started when I came across what seemed like an enticing investment opportunity with a forex trading platform. The initial promises were impressive: high returns, sophisticated trading tools, and a supportive customer service team. However, as time went on, it became apparent that this was not the legitimate trading platform it claimed to be but a sophisticated scam designed to exploit unsuspecting investors like myself. The trouble began when I tried to withdraw my funds. At first, there were minor delays, which I initially dismissed as part of the normal withdrawal process. However, as weeks turned into months, these delays turned into an endless cycle of excuses and broken promises. My attempts to contact the platform’s support team were met with vague responses and unfulfilled assurances. It became increasingly clear that my funds were trapped in a system that was designed to evade any genuine attempts at recovery. Feeling desperate and with little hope left, I began to search for solutions. That's when I discovered Digital Tech Guard Recovery. Their reputation for assisting victims of financial scams and their track record of successful recoveries gave me a glimmer of hope. I reached out to them, and from the moment I made contact, their professionalism and dedication were evident. The team at Digital Tech Guard Recovery understood the complexity of the situation and immediately started working on my case. The recovery process was thorough and efficient. Digital Tech Guard Recovery conducted a comprehensive investigation, identifying key aspects of the scam that were crucial for recovering the funds. They kept me informed every step of the way, which alleviated much of the stress and uncertainty I had been feeling. Their expertise in dealing with such cases was apparent as they navigated through legal and technical challenges to retrieve my money. Within a surprisingly short period, Digital Tech Guard Recovery managed to recover the full amount of $255,500. This was a tremendous relief and a testament to their skill and dedication.

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content: Thank you for your post however, I have seen implementations which have decommissioned IDM using IAS/IPS with their ERP system as the source in particular those customers who still use position based security and do not use Success Factors.  This negates the need to have Entra in the mix.  The customers did entertain the model described above but it did not suit their requirements.  The method of I have described can easily be implemented and has been proven to enables full automation of provisioning based on a user's business role assignment.  I am interested in our thoughts on this.

entry.title: AP Fiori Task List SAP_ESH_CONSISTENCY_CHECK to many Warning
entry.content:
Dear, Every one

In STC01 during Fiori operation, generated a lot of warning alerts.
May I know the meaning of the warning and the solution?
Is it a negligible warning?

1. I ran TaskList:SAP_ESH_INITIAL_SETUP_WRK_CLIENT
2. I ran TaskList:SAP_ESH_CONSISTENCY_CHECK to check the results.
3. SAP_ESH_CONSISTENCY_CHECK has generated a warning.

Thank you.

entry.title: Unknown Service Method: DA Service Message (405) in ILM Store Admin - using OT as store
entry.content:
Hi there,

We are using the OpenText Archive Center (21.2) as ILM enabled storage system. We completed all the steps as per the OT documentation, and were able to successfully create the tenant, login and create the ILM collection.

We were also able to successfully create and test the RFC connection in SM59, and initially our connection in the ILM Store Admin page was successful 

but for some reason now we are getting this error when we open the Store admin page and we are not able to figure out what is causing it.

 

Any suggestions on what we can check will be very much appreciated.

Thanks, Christa

entry.title: Re: BW to datasphere questions
entry.content:
1. In SAP Datasphere, you can use calculated fields and parameters to create dynamic behavior similar to BEx exit variables. It’s generally best to implement these in the Analytical View. This is where you would create your calculations and any filtering logic that mimics the behavior of BEx exit variables. You can also define parameters that users can select at runtime. Performance consideration - The role of bex variable is to derive/pass variable value. It does not scan or process records. 

2. Cell definition for 2 bex structure - you can achieve it in SAC front end layer, since the cell definition logic is always applied at the end after all the CKFs and RKFs logics are processed. so SAC frond end is the best place to achieve this. Check this post and my response. Not exactly same but you will get an idea of what logics will be better on SAC frontend. Solved: SAC Calculate after aggregation based on dataspher... - SAP Community 

3. If the rule type logic gets complex, consider implementing it in the Data Flow layer where you can control the flow and apply business logic effectively.

Thanks

Savio

entry.title: Restrict User from Cancel TECO in PM Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hello,

I wanna ask about Restrict Several User from Cancel TECO in Maintenance Orders in IW32 after the Maintenance Orders already TECO.

I Already remove BUTA Authorization but still the user can do Cancel TECO.

Is there any Suggestion for restrict that ?

entry.title: Re: Invoice cannot release accounting document.
entry.content: Added pricing analysis for both documents.

entry.title: Re: Live Data Connection to S/4HANA using Tunnel Connection with SSO based on Principal Propagation
entry.content:
There are two  incorrect points:

1.

SCC System certificate is a CA-signed one.

In this case, we should upload the issuer certificate to SAP WDP instead of the system certificate itself.

 

2.

As SAP WDP is used ,

Step 6: Setup Trust between SCC and On-Premise S/4HANA 

should be

Step 6: Setup Trust between SAP WDP and On-Premise S/4HANA

upload C-PSE of WDP to STRUST

entry.title: Custom Situation Handling Object: Creation Not Allowed via ADT
entry.content:
Hi All,

On S/4HANA Public Cloud: Has anyone successfully created a Custom Situation Object via ADT and completely integrated it to a scenario, to receive an alert based on a situation?

I had written to SAP in Dec 2022 & in Jun 2023 via OSS messages to understand how can that be done and at both times, I received message back saying all the components required to make this work is not yet released.

Now, even after 2048 upgrade (and 18 months after my last OSS message to SAP), still the Situation is no different. When I try to built a custom situation object via ADT, I still do not have authorization to do that (eventhough I have complete development access to the tenant)

The interfaces required to have an event based trigger is not yet released. Interfaces required for defining callback classes are also not released. Thus, custom classes cannot be defined for any of the actions or triggers.

The only way I have managed to create a custom situation object is via Key User Extensibility, referencing a custom CDS view.

SAP had published the tutorial and examples for creation of custom situation object via ADT, long time ago (https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/creating-situation-objects?version=s4hana_cloud) and messages like this, this & this from SAP employees, seem to indicate that whatever is required to build the solution is all delivered by SAP.

So, what am I missing here? Has SAP delivered this functionality at all for S/4HANA on Cloud (or ABAP on Cloud) as per their training/documentation?

If yes, what is still needed in developer roles to avoid the error? If no, when is this functionality expected to be fully released?

Cc: @ana_goncalves @angelika_salmen 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Adding association as input parameter for custom action in CAP
entry.content:
Are you sure this is correct?

As we know that you can't use associations as an input parameter of custom actions,

 Taking a look at one of my projects, https://github.com/MertSAP/AppTemplater/blob/main/srv/apptemplater-service.cds, I have done something like this in the past:

 entity ServiceRole             as projection on my.ServiceRole actions {
        action fillEntities(@(
                             title:'Auth Type',
                             Common:{
                                 ValueListWithFixedValues: true,
                                 ValueList               : {
                                     Label         : '{i18n>ServiceAuth}',
                                     CollectionPath: 'AuthorisationType',
                                     Parameters    : [{
                                         $Type            : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut',
                                         ValueListProperty: 'AuthorisationType',
                                         LocalDataProperty: AuthorisationType
                                     }]
                                 }
                             }
                         )
                         AuthorisationType : String(30));
    };

    entity ServiceAuth        as projection on my.ServiceAuth;
    entity AssociationType   as projection on my.AssociationType;

entry.title: SQL Anywhere 17 旧サーバーから新サーバーにDBの移行
entry.content: 新しいサーバにSQL Anywhere 17をインストールし、旧サーバで作成したサービスを作成・起動しDBを作成しました。その後、サービスを停止して旧サーバからdbをコピーしサービスを実行しましたがエラーで起動しませんでした。エラー内容を確かめようと dbsrv17 -o dbファイル名 をコマンドから入力・実行するすると、データベース サーバーに名前を付けてください。 -nオプションを使用してください。とのメッセージが表示されました。コピーでは移行はできないのでしょうか。それとも手順があるのでしょうか。ご存じの方回答をよろしくお願いします。

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts
entry.content: Hi @rupambhatta , Is it required to have Workzone subscription enabled in the provider subaccount ?

entry.title: The system does not have authority object SM_BPM_DET.
entry.content:
Missing authority object SM_BPM_DET to run RC_VALUE_DISCOVERY_COLL_DATA.

"The system does not have the authority object SM_BPM_DET."

Please let me know how to add authority to run the above program.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: The system does not have authority object SM_BPM_DET.
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Regarding your query, the following KBA should help you:

3445441-How to add a specific authorization object to a user.

In case still anything is unclear about the KBA, you may please feel free to contact the responsible authorization team BC-SEC-AUT-PFC for further guidance.

Have a nice day!

Sincerely,

Yuki

SAP Support

entry.title: How can I prevent materials with the deletion flag from being displayed in the materials list?
entry.content:
Hello expert,

In the S/4HANA public cloud system, users set the deletion flag for a product ( in the Manage Product Master Data app ), and they don't want this product to show up in the material list anymore. How can I do it? Thanks.

BR,

Wendy

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David,

Your post attracts me a lot.
In my country, there are limited opportunities for technology training and education, so this is a valuable chance for me to deepen my knowledge of SAP. After two years of work experience, I’ve developed a strong interest in becoming an SAP consultant. I enjoy working with SAP, helping people manage their businesses, and continuously learning in this field. I’m confident that this is the career path I want to pursue.

I truly appreciate your generosity in offering these SAP learning courses to us and would be grateful for the opportunity to participate.

I am looking forward to your support.
Thank you very much.

Best regards,

entry.title: SuccessFactors Work Zone navigation bar
entry.content:
For the second level navigation bar, is there a way to "lock" it so that when the page is scrolled to the bottom, the navigation bar can still be seen and not "disappear"?

Alternatively, if the above cannot be achieved, is there anyway i can include a custom text widget with hyperlink at the bottom of the page, that will bring me back to the top of the page upon clicking it? Example at the bottom of the page, have a "Back to the top" text/link that ic clickable and brings me to the top of the page. If this is doable, what is the hyperlink that needs to be configured?

entry.title: Image pixels for Manage Recruiting Sites
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Is there is pixel limitation for the image which would be hosted in the Internal and External Career site from Manage Recruiting Sites ?

entry.title: Re: SAC Live Data Connection Adding Measures
entry.content:
I could not open the screenshot but assuming you have not created a measure in model.

Open the model -> Navigate to the Modeling section in SAC. Select the model where you want to add a measure or create a new model.

Click on the Measures tab within the model.
Create a New Measure -> Choose either From Existing Data or
Create a new measure based on calculations.

You can then use it in story

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
Hi @ranshapira 

For your first question, not possible according to SAP. We are also wanting to delay the deployment of the new learning experience ui but not possible. The toggle will be there. 

 

Jenn

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management - API provider Unauthorized issue 401
entry.content: Hi All, I am configuring SAP API provider to access my SAP GW server and getting 401 access while clicking on discover option. Destination is created and it is working fine, cloud connector is properly setup as well.

entry.title: Using SAP Commerce as PIM in CCV2 + Licensing cost
entry.content:
Hi

Does CCV2 licensing come with a reduced cost for customers to use SAP Commerce Cloud as a PIM only solution(and not use the commerce features of it)?

entry.title: Re: Converting dimensional Attributes into Fact Measures
entry.content: you can use calculated measures or derived attributes within your models. You can create calculated fields in your modeling layer that derive measures based on dimensional attributes without explicitly joining the tables. This allows you to use the dimensional attributes to influence your fact measures while maintaining a separation between the fact and dimension tables.

entry.title: Re: Introducing Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One Cloud
entry.content:
Hi

I was able to fix it as the issue was in the name udp where we had given different name, 

and also the add on developed works in the normal client (with user connected with idp) and when I try from browser access I get error connection failed and add on stops, any documentation on how to handle add ons for browser access (dispatcher)

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts
entry.content: If so @rupambhatta , can you please help understand what level of subscriptions are to be required to be enabled in provider subaccount?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - Last Logon Time
entry.content:
you can query the SYS.USER_LOGINS table, which contains details about user logon events, including the last logon time.

Thanks

Savio

entry.title: Re: Solution Options for Supply Network Planning
entry.content:
Dear LinaGu,

Thanks for clarifying an important topic of how to manage SNP options in the new world of S/4HANA and IBP. The post is very detailed and answers most of the typical queries we face in our consulting work. Maybe you can also clarify how this would work in a mill products scenario where we are using characteristics dependent planning (CDP).

It would be great help if you can make some of the links accessible since they are on SAP sharepoint. I tried but am not able to login using my external credentials.

Many thanks for addressing the requests.

Regards,

Gaurav Helaiya.

entry.title: Continous innovation compatability Integration pack

hi 

While SAP Commerce offers continous innovation releases on platform+composable storefront, what is the release cadence for the integration pack and SAP Backend systems?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

I identify as a third-year college student with a keen interest in the SAP Digital Skills Initiative. While I am still learning and have basic knowledge of SAP and ERP, I am eager to expand my skills and knowledge in this field.

I would greatly appreciate the opportunity for a free voucher to support my SAP certification journey. This initiative would be invaluable in helping me kickstart my career in the SAP ecosystem.

Thank you for considering my application!

Best regards,

Giang Le

entry.title: Re: Financial Document (Letter of Credit) FTR_CREATE further processing in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content: Hello Experts, Could you please advise on this. Thank you, kind regards Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: How to restrict JNL delivery document in open billing documents list for intra-state STO process
entry.content: Hello Experts, Could you please advise on this. Thank you, kind regards Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi, David,

I’m a female student, and recently, I’ve been hearing from friends about the promising career prospects in SAP, which has sparked my interest. I’ve been contemplating a career change for some time, and this field seems intriguing. I recently came across a post from a blogger who specializes in SAP [https://www.khanhnph.com/], which further drew me toward exploring this area. I’m excited to start learning SAP and am committed to investing the necessary time to grasp its fundamentals and business processes. Considering the current trends in the Vietnamese job market, I believe there’s significant room for learning and professional growth in this field.

I would be very happy if I could take this free SAP test once.

Thank you and best regards,

Nhi

entry.title: Integrate Slack Channel with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
This is a simple example on how to integrate SAP Cloud ALM with a SLACK channel, to post the SAP Cloud ALM alerting information and referenced the following help documentation:

  • SAP Cloud ALM Integration with External Chat Systems
  • External API Management in SAP Cloud ALM
  • Slack API chap.postMessage

Create a new Slack Channel
Add a new channel as an administrator of your SLACK workspace.



Channel ID can be found in the "View Channel Details"

 

Build a new APP for the incoming webhook message.

  1. Build a new application from scratch


  2. Define the Scopes for the new application.
    Under the "Oauth& Permissions" tab, add the following Bot Token Scopes
    • incoming-webhook
    • channels:read
    • chat:write.customize
    • chat:write

       

  3. Install the application to the workspace
  4. Get the Bot user Oauth Token and Webhook URLs

     

Create a Destination under the SAP Cloud ALM subaccount

  • Type: HTTP
  • URL: https://slack.com/api/
  • Proxy type: Internet
  • Authentication: No Authentication
  • Additional Properties:
    URL.headers.Authorization =     Bearer <BOT User Oauth token>

Create a new Webhook in SAP Cloud ALM - External API Management.

  • Destination Source: BTP Destination
  • Path: chat.postMessage
  • Destination Id: <destination created in the above step>
  • Ext. Resource Type: Chat

Add a new mapping rule for the Slack integration.



here is a sample JSON file for the mapping rule.
Please exchange the parameter "username" and "channel" to your channel ID and user name.

 

 

{
    "_information": {
        "_version": "1",
        "_source": "SAP Cloud ALM Event Situation",
        "_destination": "Slack",
        "_name": "SAP Cloud ALM Event Situations to Slack",
        "_comment": "SLACK - Channel #calm(Workplace CALM)"
    },
    "switches": [
        {
            "name": "switchPriority",
            "cases": [
                {
                    "when": "FATAL",
                    "then": "Highest"
                },
                {
                    "when": "ERROR",
                    "then": "High"
                },
                {
                    "when": "WARNING",
                    "then": "Low"
                },
                {
                    "when": "INFO",
                    "then": "Lowest"
                }
            ],
            "default": "Lowest"
        }
    ],
    "structure": {
        "request": {
            "ok": true,
            "username": "CALM_OPERATION",
            "channel": "C07QF3VQ908",
            "blocks": [
                {
                    "type": "section",
                    "text": {
                        "type": "mrkdwn",
                        "text": "*SAP Cloud ALM Event: EVENT-SITUATION.CREATED*"
                    }
                },
                {
                    "type": "section",
                    "text": {
                        "type": "plain_text",
                        "text": "Subject: #{subject}"
                    }
                },
                {
                    "type": "section",
                    "text": {
                        "type": "plain_text",
                        "text": "Description: rating:#{rating} - priority:${SWITCH(switchPriority,rating)} - serviceType:#{serviceType} - serviceId:#{serviceId} - eventType:#{eventType} - eventName:#{eventName}"
                    }
                },
                {
                    "type": "section",
                    "text": {
                        "type": "plain_text",
                        "text": "workNotes: #{workNotes}"
                    }
                }
            ]
        },
        "response":
        {
            "chatCreated": true
        }
    },
    "eventTypeMapping": {
        "_comment": "Specificeventtypemapping",
        "operationMappings": [
            {
                "eventType": "EVENT-SITUATION.CREATED",
                "operation": "POST",
                "responseRoot": ""
            },
            {
                "eventType": "EVENT-SITUATION.CLOSED",
                "operation": "POST",
                "responseRoot": "",
                "structure": {
                    "request": {
                        "ok": true,
                        "username": "CALM_OPERATION",
                        "channel": "C07QF3VQ908",
                        "blocks": [
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                                    "text": "*SAP Cloud ALM Event: EVENT-SITUATION.CLOSED*"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Subject: #{subject}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Description: rating:#{rating} - priority:${SWITCH(switchPriority,rating)} - serviceType:#{serviceType} - serviceId:#{serviceId} - eventType:#{eventType} - eventName:#{eventName}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "workNotes: #{workNotes}"
                                }
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    "response":
                    {
                        "chatCreated": true
                    }
                }

            },
            {
                "eventType": "EVENT-SITUATION.UPDATED",
                "operation": "POST",
                "responseRoot": "",
                "structure": {
                    "request": {
                        "ok": true,
                        "username": "CALM_OPERATION",
                        "channel": "C07QF3VQ908",
                        "blocks": [
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                                    "text": "*SAP Cloud ALM Event: EVENT-SITUATION.UPDATED*"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Subject: #{subject}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Description: rating:#{rating} - priority:${SWITCH(switchPriority,rating)} - serviceType:#{serviceType} - serviceId:#{serviceId} - eventType:#{eventType} - eventName:#{eventName}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "workNotes: #{workNotes}"
                                }
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    "response":
                    {
                        "chatCreated": true
                    }
                }
            },
            {
                "eventType": "EVENT-SITUATION.PING",
                "operation": "POST",
                "responseRoot": "",
                "structure": {
                    "request": {
                        "ok": true,
                        "username": "CALM_OPERATION",
                        "channel": "C07QF3VQ908",
                        "blocks": [
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                                    "text": "*SAP Cloud ALM Event: EVENT-SITUATION.PING*"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Subject: #{subject}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Description: rating:#{rating} - priority:${SWITCH(switchPriority,rating)} - serviceType:#{serviceType} - serviceId:#{serviceId} - eventType:#{eventType} - eventName:#{eventName}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "workNotes: #{workNotes}"
                                }
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    "response":
                    {
                        "chatCreated": true
                    }
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}

 

 

Create a new Subscription

  • Resource Type: Event Situation
  • Wbehook: <the webhook created in the above step>
  • Mapping: <the mapping created in the above step>
  • Type: Built-in

     

Testing the Slack integration under any Alert generated in the SAP Cloud ALM Monitoring application

Verify the Console log in the External API Management for troubleshooting

entry.title: Re: crystal report 13.0.25.3158 installed, Not working Ex...
entry.content: Web application

entry.title: How To Change the Default Script Language Used for Master Data
entry.content:
How To Change the Default Script Language Used for Master Data


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How To Change the Default Script Language Used for Ma...
entry.content:
This is current system behavior.

It is currently not possible to change the default value for scripts.

Once you first select a default language for scripts, the system sets this one as default and does not allow changes.

Refer KBA:https://me.sap.com/notes/3354711

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest Official Rules
entry.content: Hi @thomas_jung , I joined the group last day, when am I supposed to get the registered batch?

entry.title: Re: SAP future strategy around Scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 in Private Cloud Edition
entry.content: Hi Riyaj,

entry.title: Re: no cos/revenue cost element to display in OKGA
entry.content:
made a mistake by using a wrong T-code here. should use OKG4 to define updates for RA instead of using OKGA.... 

oooops....
